title: Kenaitze Summer Food Service Program
summary: Kenaitze Indian Tribe is participating in the Summer Food Service Program through its Youth Services Behavioral Health Summer Program and its Yaghanen Language and Culture Summer Program. Meals will be provided to all eligible children free of charge. To be eligible to receive free meals at a residential or non-residential camp, children must meet the income guidelines for reduced-price meals in the National School Lunch Program. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 2, 2023
summary: June 2 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 3.96% , from the level on 05/25/2023 of 12.398 M km 2 to 11.907 M km 2 for this week. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 29 May, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 29 May, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
